agent_usage.goal: Reduce token usage by loading only the JSON section needed for the current task.

files.01-project-overview-and-scope.json: Use for project purpose, scope, objectives, and target users.
files.02-user-roles-and-permissions.json: Use for RBAC, user capabilities, and access limits.
files.03-system-features-and-modules.json: Use for feature planning, module building, UI generation, and workflow creation.
files.04-database-and-implementation-notes.jso: Use for database design, migrations, models, indexes, and implementation phases.

agent_usage.prompt_rule: Do not load all files unless the task needs full system context. Load only the matching keys or modules.
